author: Jackie S.
pros: We have utilized Shopper Approved for quite a number of years. Teaming up with such a respected third-party entity to gather and distribute our feedback has been highly advantageous for our business. They are prompt in addressing inquiries and provide assistance whenever necessary. I have always been able to connect with a real individual.
cons: I have no complaints, they are doing a really great job in helping my business grow, highly recommended

description: It's been great. The customer service is always there when you need them, and the program is very easy to use.
author: Cory L.
pros: Easy to use and love all the amazing features that allows you to show your reviews.
cons: No Cons, everything has been working well!

description: It was a great reviewing platform, but they were never too active and as time passed, they seemed sub-par.
author: Kevin B.
pros: Their platform is SUPER easy to use. Pretty easy to set up and keep things going. Randomly you'll have issues getting stars to show on your ads and such, that part gets a bit vague with them.
cons: Their platform was much more limited than Yotpo or Trustpilot...they pretty much ghosted me and were gonna charge me the annual couple thousand bucks when we wanted to make a switch too. We had 14k+ reviews with them after 3 years and they were difficult to communicate with.

review_title: Great Tool For Boosting Ecommerce Websites
description: At our marketing agency we recommend ShopperApproved merchant reviews to all our clients. While there are some other options on the market that have pros and cons, we like the inexpensive and well thought out merchant review system from ShopperApproved. We do not typically recommend product reviews, as we prefer to retain those in whatever ecommerce CMS we're using, and we do not have an opinion about their local reviews offering (none of our clients are local businesses). We find that the ShopperApproved rating badges and javascript snippets showing recent reviews are very beneficial to conversions. We also find that when ShopperApproved merchant reviews are syndicated to Google Ads, they have a positive effect on ad performance. We like the way the survey content and timing can be customized, and we love the ease of install too - just one JS snippet on the order confirmation page is enough to start collecting merchant reviews. If we have any complaints, it's that pricing is not consistent. Many of our clients have reached out to ShopperApproved and received vastly different price quotes. Also, the user interface for the service is dated and clunky. It's not at all unusable, however, just a little confusing. Still, these are minor issues.
author: Jason L.
pros: Easy Install, Decent Configuration Options, Merchant Review Data Syndicated To Google, Good Selection of Widgets to Promote Reviews, Great Tool For Marketing Ecommerce Websites
cons: Clunky User Interface, Inconsistent Pricing

description: I am happy with the ease of use and the communication of everyone involved with Shopper Approved. I was an early adopter but ashamed to say didn't take advantage of everything they offer until recently.
author: Ed S.
pros: I have always been impressed with Shopper Approved. The product has evolved and grown with ecommerce as times have changed.
cons: They were too nice and didn't push me to change!

review_title: Easy to use, even better support
description: Shopper Approved makes things very easy when it comes to handling online reviews. The video testimonials are easy, customization of messaging, ease of use in contact a customer should their review warrant it. Shopper Approved support is also fantastic. My contact, [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN], answers my questions/helps me with issues at lightning fast speed!
author: William S.
pros: Shopper Approved is easy to use and makes sorting through lots of reviews that come in throughout a day a breeze. The customer resolution feature is also very nice in that one does not have to contact the customer outside of SA, all the information needed is right there.
cons: The dashboard is a bit old feeling and could be updated/modernized to make for even easier UX. I've been told this is on the to do list for Shopper Approved so I am not worried about the timing. Looking forward to the new interface!

review_title: Collected many seller reviews over the years
description: Overall it's worked well for us. Gather good reviews has helped our business grow. It's a reasonable price compared to other review apps as well.
author: LISA G.
pros: They email us for each feedback left. So we can reply back to the positive feedback and address negative feedback. Customers can see we are here and engaged either way.
cons: Sometimes I don't hear back from customer service when I send a email. So I'm not sure if they worked on a particular issue.

review_title: ShopperApproved has helped me share thousands of consumer reviews!
description: I'd say it's worth the cost, I know it helps us generate more sales than we would if we didn't have it.
author: Kevin B.
pros: - I love the Stars integration that my google ads would get. - The badge icon really does look good and help validate our legitimacy, we always refer our clients to our ShopperApproved to see our validity.
cons: - I'd like more to do, and if they have a more user-friendly dashboard. It is a bit clunky, kinda hard to find what I'm looking for sometimes. But, it works fine.

review_title: LOVE LOVE LOVE SOME SHOPPER APPROVED!!
description: my overall experience with shopper approved has been genuinely positive all the way around!! the user friendliness, the excellent customer service, & ease of use of the program in general!
author: AMBER M.
pros: i love everything shopper approved has to offer!!
cons: i like all shopper approved qualities!! so, this question doesnt really apply to me.

description: really good solutions great service all round a good platform to use
author: emma B.
pros: The reviews and the ratings for other companies
cons: the layout a little but clunky to navigate
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good for reviews/not great as a customer
author: Erik S.
pros: It’s a good product for companies to gain reviews from their customers and it’s easy to submit a review.
cons: I think it can be annoying that they email you multiple times asking for a review
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Shopper Approved promised that we would see an increase in sales after implementing their review collection system on our site and we have definitely seen an increase. Customers have even mentioned that they purchased from us because of the positive reviews.
author: James D.
pros: Shopper Approved helps us collect reviews directly on our site. We are also able to have past reviews on full display on our site as well, which can help to generate new sales.
cons: We have experienced some technical glitches in the past, but customer support has always been able to resolve these issues for us.

review_title: Great product, fair price and they're here to help you get reviews
description: Now that everything is working as expected, it's fantastic! It was a bit of a growing pain going from our reviews to a third-party site, but it's working splendidly and gaining reviews everyday. A fair price for a high value product.
author: Christian H.
pros: The reviews are important, as it's organic content from our customers. It helps for others interested in the product to be able to read that. It engages others in the process on their path to purchase. It's critical for us, as it can increase the likelihood of a sale. The ease of use is one of my favorite features and the support is good once you pin point what the issue you may be experiencing are. The entire team will step-up to fix whatever your working through.
cons: Implementation was initially good and then it wasn't working. The time to fix it was less than desirable. However, they fixed it as soon as we found out what the root cause of the issue was. So not much of a con, but worth noting.

author: Khalil M.
pros: The software, team, and customer satisfaction!
cons: Nothing really, we love using Shopper Approved!

review_title: I could not be happier with this company.
description: I belive it is essential not only can you get ranked in google but your perspective customer can learn all about you prior to making a purchase.
author: Scott S.
pros: The fit and finish, the trust badges, the customer service, the 1 on 1 training, the creatives. I am excited to have them on my team!
cons: I purchased their whole package and they gave me a great deal so far so good no complaints.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to collect reviews, which help to grow our business
description: For us, there's a clear relationship between displaying (good) reviews on our site and gaining more customers as a result of that. Also, their customer service is attentive, and they've even done some custom coding in our account to support our business needs.
author: Lana A.
pros: We like that Shopper Approved lets us collect reviews using their link within our own email template and coming from our company email. We also like that their code makes it easy to display reviews on our site.
cons: I wish we had the ability to customize the look and feel of the review collection form on our own, but Shopper Approved has helped us to do that when needed.

description: Amazing....All questions or concerns easily resolved. Great interaction by phone or email. Simple onboarding.
author: Ed A.
pros: I like the simplicity and ability to easily customize to our shopping experience.
cons: Would love to see additional syndication oppertunities of our reviews. Otherwise very satisified with the product and the way it is displayed on our website and the elegant and simple use of the backend.

author: Taylor M.
pros: Easy to use, offers real-time reviews that update to our e-commerce site almost instantly.
cons: Wish we could have a customer re-review us immediately. We often times solve a problem from a bad review immediately in which the customer wishes to re-review us because we solved the pain point. However, we have to re-quest a re-review link and often, they can't re-review us for 30 days since their last review.

description: The Shopper Approved team is responsive and knowledgeable. Any issues that arise are promptly addressed. Communication is excellent and working with their team has been a pleasure including [SENSITIVE CONTENT] and others.
author: David V.
pros: Excellent feature set and robust API. Easy to use UI and administration.
cons: Would be great if company responses were visible on the cert page. Very important.

description: I highly recommend this software. It collects reviews very well and it also allows me to interact with my customers by responding to their reviews.
author: Louis J.
pros: Shopper Approved is easy to use, works seamlessly with my website. Integration is easy, and tech support is very responsive when I have needed them. Also everyone is nice, and eager to assist when needed.
cons: Nothing that I have come across in the last 10 yrs or so.

author: Robert A.
pros: Discovery and implementation phases were great. Gave me the confidence to move forward with reviews. Now that we have the reviews implemented on our site we have had a tremendous lift in traffic.
cons: Great job all around. Not sure what could have been done better

review_title: Excellent customer service on integration new cart
author: Jerry K.
pros: We recently transitioned to a new ecommerce platform and needed to integrate our 10 year old shopper approved review history into the new cart. We got assigned one customer service rep who stayed with us through the end of the process and responded quickly to each question along the way with excellent to the point answers that were easy to understand.
cons: The monthly fee is up there, but you receive quality customer service and reliability.

review_title: All good , responsible custom service and easy to handle
author: Eva S.
pros: All good , responsible custom service and easy to handle
cons: none , i do like all of this , good custom service and easy to talk with clients

review_title: Shopper Approved is a great partner
author: Meredith R.
pros: Getting started with Shopper Approved completely revitalized our review platform at a critical time for our e-commerce business. The amount of reviews we received increased significantly and this has made a big difference in our organic traffic as well as helped with acquiring new customers. Shopper Approved also provided some best practices that helped us get started and these practices help to continue our growth today.
cons: Would love to have an account person to check in with more frequenly.

author: Jeff S.
pros: Easy to use, lots of features and a great support team
cons: I find the backend dashboard to be a little confusing. I was trying to see total product review counts the other day and couldn't figure it out.
